notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG commodity-salience basket from approved card HE-SALIENCE-2025_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, use synchronized simple returns from the immediately prior complete month, form an equal-weight XTI/XNG/XAU/XAG reference payoff, calculate source-defined salience with theta 0.1, rank dates, normalize delta 0.7 weights, and calculate population weight-return covariance. Buy higher ST, sell lower ST, and reject excessive post-rounding dollar-notional mismatch. XAU and XAG are read-only reference members. Q02 is a strict four-CFD-reference and two-CFD-rank falsification; no source performance or portfolio admission is claimed.
